visible_observations: A mature bald heavily muscled man plants his feet wide and drives one enormously enlarged pale fist and forearm toward the viewer while the normal hand stays clenched beside the body.

Tattoos or scar patterns cover the head and skin; the transformed arm contains swollen corded forms and embedded plates, straps, studs, and circular emblems, contrasting with a dark layered leather mantle, skirt, trousers, and heavy boots.
The shoulder rotation, foreshortened fist, bent knees, direct stare, and bared teeth establish an immediate close-range bruiser action.
strengths: The giant transformed fist is a decisive dominant anatomy idea that communicates role, attack method, and bodily cost in one read.
Wide stance, mature muscular build, clenched off hand, and engaged shoulders make the figure physically credible as a powerful fighter.
Pale altered flesh against dark clothing gives the attack arm strong visual priority.
defects: Extreme foreshortening and oversized anatomy make the fist occupy much of the image, reducing the face, torso, normal arm, and lower-body action to support for one spectacle limb.
Tattoos, cords, scars, plates, rivets, patterned leather, and repeated straps cover nearly every surface at similar frequency, weakening material and focal hierarchy.
The giant gauntlet-fist and grimacing strongman presentation communicate a familiar fantasy brawler archetype more clearly than a unique culture or personal history.
uncertainties: Unaided inspection cannot determine whether the enlarged arm is permanent anatomy, worn armor, a curse, or a temporary transformation.
The circular plate symbols and dense skin markings do not reveal their specific function or origin.

visible_observations: Three black alternatives retain the same broad bald humanoid while varying a giant square-fingered fist thrust toward the viewer, a low charging body with a long conical drill-like forearm, and an upright advancing figure carrying a smaller banded cylindrical fist.
The candidates change limb proportion, fist construction, posture, center of gravity, and attack direction, but preserve the same muscular body and one-arm premise.
strengths: Candidate A creates a blunt frontal impact, candidate B a low piercing charge, and candidate C a more mobile advancing boxer; the weapon-arm behavior is materially explored.
The transformed arm remains immediately identifiable in all three silhouettes.
defects: The alternatives vary the same dominant fist mechanism rather than testing a substantially different anatomy, protection strategy, or overall combat silhouette.

Candidate A's fist overwhelms the body, candidate B's cone resembles a drill attachment more than anatomy, and candidate C reduces the distinctive scale contrast until the figure approaches a generic large fighter.
uncertainties: The silhouette sheet does not establish whether the arm can change among these shapes or whether they are exclusive anatomical designs.

visible_observations: A mature scarred and tattooed face turns directly toward the viewer with brows drawn down, eyes narrowed, nostrils slightly tense, the upper lip raised, and teeth partly exposed in a crooked grimace or confident sneer.
The massive altered arm fills the lower foreground, linking the confrontational gaze and facial tension to the impending strike.
strengths: Direct eye contact, compressed brow, exposed teeth, and the weaponized arm communicate immediate aggression and confidence rather than neutrality.
Bald head, facial geometry, dense markings, broad jaw, and asymmetrical mouth create a clearly adult individual.
defects: The expression remains close to a conventional tough-guy snarl or battle sneer; it does not visibly distinguish grievance, fear, compulsion, shame, or restraint.
Dense tattoo and scar detail competes with eyelid, cheek, and mouth tension, making the emotional evidence less clean than the overall aggression cue.
uncertainties: The unaided read cannot decide whether he is enraged, enjoying dominance, bracing against pain, or challenging the viewer.

visible_observations: At native size, the bald head, broad dark shoulders, huge pale horizontal fist, wide stance, large boots, and planted lower body remain visible.
Facial expression, tattoos, scars, layered garments, embedded plates, normal hand, and most altered-flesh structure collapse into the dark figure and mottled fist.
strengths: The pale oversized fist against the dark body forms a clear brawler icon and preserves the primary action direction.
The wide feet and shoulders keep the figure grounded and weighty.
defects: The fist becomes a single bright block, obscuring its anatomical-versus-armored construction and making the reduced figure depend on one exaggerated limb.
Dark clothing and background merge across the torso and legs, while the normal arm and face lose readable separation.
uncertainties: The native image alone does not establish whether players would read a cursed biological fist, a giant gauntlet, or an ordinary oversized punch effect.
